rationale: Read every cited file at 001ed3a5 (code tree byte-identical to the plan's 3ddf2a1f pin — only plan.md differs). All line-pinned claims are exact: resolvePanelGateFacts panel.go:302 leaves beadID empty on !IsBead; gate.go:372 rev-parses "bead/"+beadID; leg-5 Warn at gate.go:186-189 with the empty-interpolation 'references branch bead/,' text; leg-5b fragments 'panel for : '/'could not verify branch bead/' verified; RawMergeFence exported at gate.go:58 and suffixes legs 6/8/9/10; instruct verdict() (panelstate.go:99-136) returns d.Message at :135 with non-bead staleness left inert, so CLI-only sanitize is the correct zero-diff seam. Zero-byte-diff is achievable: renderPanelTally computes PanelGateDecision inside cmd/mindspec (panel.go:457), leg 6 gates on SHAs not IsBead, and TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision's Message-equality rows are ALL bead fixtures (panel_test.go:371-413), so non-bead-gated sanitize passes both pins unmodified. R2 regex at ms-panel.js:138, mirror cmp-identical, floor tests present. R3: no --gate flag today; PanelGateKeys:101, resolvers 750/766, AdvisoryDefault:832 (0,false) confirmed. R4: Reviewer.model() 139-144 family-fallback; validateReviewerEntries:540 refuses only neither-set. Two cosmetic imprecisions only.
findings: Exact-line verification (all match at 001ed3a5): resolvePanelGateFacts cmd/mindspec/panel.go:302 (IsBead guard, beadID ""); ResolveGateFacts rev-parse of "bead/"+beadID at internal/panel/gate.go:372; leg-5 Warn at gate.go:186-189; leg-5b at ~200-203 with the exact fragments the plan pins; RawMergeFence (exported) gate.go:58; verdict() internal/instruct/panelstate.go:99-136 returning d.Message at :135; renderPanelVerify reviewed_head_sha block panel.go:361-369 incl. '(target branch no longer exists — assumed merged)'; tallyExitAction panel.go:526 whose recovery line today ends 'then mindspec complete <bead>' — grounding the non-bead recovery rewrite.

Zero-byte-internal-diff claim is supported by the tree: the Decision is produced in internal/panel but rendered in cmd/mindspec — renderPanelTally itself calls panel.PanelGateDecision(facts) at panel.go:457, so sanitizeNonBeadDecision can wrap entirely in the CLI layer. TestPanelVerbs_DecisionIsPanelGateDecision (panel_test.go:487) pins Action only; TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision (panel_test.go:367) pins Action AND Message but every row is a bead fixture (BeadID set, basePanel at :371-376), so a strictly non-bead-gated sanitize leaves both passing unmodified as the plan claims.

Un-shadowing claim grounded: leg 6 gates on p.ReviewedHeadSHA != "" && f.HeadSHA != "" (gate.go:209), not on IsBead, so feeding the target SHA reaches it; legs 8-10 follow; leg 7 stays unreachable non-bead (panelBeadWorktreePath returns "" for beadID=="" before panelWorktreeListFn — ADR-0030 budget claim holds); exec.IsRefNotFound is errors.Is(err, gitutil.ErrRefNotFound) (mindspec_executor.go:883, sentinel at gitutil/gitops.go:19).

Seam claim grounded: revParseForPanelFn (panel.go:34-39) doc comment covers only panel create's write-time capture, and resolvePanelGateFacts currently bypasses it (exec.RevParseRef at :310) — so the plan's 'extend the seam' framing is accurate and the bead path stays byte-identical.

R2 grounded: SHELL_METACHAR_RE at ms-panel.js:138 is exactly /[\x60;|&\n]|\$\(/ with the \x60 comment at 133-137, validateShellSafe 140-144, template assembly in buildCommand at ~78; cmp of plugin vs .claude mirror exits 0; both floor tests and WorkflowFiles() (embed.go:55) exist.

R3 grounded: no --gate flag (init registers spec/target/bead/round only, panel.go:210-218); CreateInput (create.go:51-74) has no Gate; Create stamps fields at :118-127; Panel.Gate string `json:"gate,omitempty"` with the R9 stable-contract comment at panel.go:91; PanelGateKeys 5-key slice at config.go:101; PanelGateExpectedReviewers:750, PanelGateApproveThresholdExpr:766, PanelGateAdvisoryDefault:832 returning (0,false) for non-bead+empty-gate; reviewerCountNotesFor at cmd/mindspec/config.go:535 is the real advisory call site; config show --gate exists; rejectControlBytes (panel.go:255) already guards --bead/--target; TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert at internal/panel/panel_test.go:304; resetPanelCreateFlags flag list {spec,target,bead,round} extendable with 'gate'.

R4 grounded: Reviewer.model() config.go:139-144 returns Family when Model==""; validateReviewerEntries config.go:540 refuses only r.model()=="" (neither-set) plus non-positive count; Model is a plain gofmt-aligned 'Model  string' at :116 so the plan's grep pin will match; PanelGateReviewerSlots at :777.
MINOR (cosmetic, non-blocking): withTestChdir lives in cmd/mindspec/context_test.go:50, not panel_test.go/testhelpers_test.go as the Testing Strategy implies — same package, fully usable.

MINOR (informational): the plan pins claims to 3ddf2a1f while the panel pin is 001ed3a5; verified git diff between them touches only plan.md, so every code line reference is valid at both. Note for O3: config.go:93's PanelGateKeys comment cites '(spec 112 R1, ADR-0034)' jointly — the plan's re-attribution to 112 R1 is about where the enum/vocabulary-split provenance lives, which the comment's own text ('These name REVIEW EVENTS...') supports; not a tree contradiction.
